attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID                  ,
  EXALA.AE_LINE_NUM                   ,
  EXALA.APPLICATION_ID                ,
  EXALA.CCID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID           ,
 EXALA.GL_SL_LINK_ID                 ,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA.ACCOUNT_CLASS AS ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE      ,
  EXALA.PARTY_ID                      ,
  EXALA.PARTY_SITE_ID                 ,
  'C' AS PARTY_TYPE_CODE              ,/*HARDCODED AS C BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA.ENTERED_DR,
EXALA.ENTERED_CR,
EXALA.ACCOUNTED_DR,
 EXALA.ACCOUNTED_CR,
  EXALA.CURRENCY_CODE                 ,
  EXALA. ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY            ,/*HARDCODED AS C BY VKOPPURA */
EXALA.ORDER_NUMBER     ,/* ATTRIBUTE1 MODIFIED AS ORDER_NUMBER BY VKOPPURA */
EXALA.ORDER_LINE_ID         ,/* ATTRIBUTE2 MODIFIED AS LINE_ID BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA.TRX_NUMBER       ,/* ATTRIBUTE3 MODIFIED AS TRX_NUMBER BY VKOPPURA */
 EXALA.TRX_LINE_ID ,/* ATTRIBUTE4 MODIFIED AS TRX_LINE_ID BY VKOPPURA */
 EXT_ALL.TRX_DATE      ,/* ATTRIBUTE5 MODIFIED AS TRX_DATE BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID ,
EXALA.DIST_TYPE    ,
  EXT_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY  ,
'3500-01-01 01:00:00' AS EXPIRATION_DATE   ,
  EXALA. GL_SL_LINK_TABLE              ,
  EXALA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR ,
      EXALA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR ,
      EXALA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,
      EXALA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR ,
  EXALA.GL_DATE    ,
  EXALA.LEDGER_ID                     ,
EXALA. SOURCE_TABLE                  ,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA. SOURCE_ID                     ,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA. CREATION_DATE                 ,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
 EXALA. LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
  'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME                   ,
  EXALA.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
  EXALA.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
  EXALA.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
  EXALA.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
  'STANDALONE' AS ATTRIBUTION_CD,
  CAST(100 AS DECIMAL(18,8)) AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
  COALESCE(EXT_ALL.SKU,'UNKNOWN') SKU,
  CAST(-9999 AS VARCHAR(150)) AS OA_ATTRIB_ID,
  EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID AS TRANSACTION_ID,
  EXALA.ATTRIBUTE2
  FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL EXALA
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR EFAA 
  ON EXALA.APPLICATION_ID = EFAA.APPLICATION_ID
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA
  ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID
   AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = EXALA.APPLICATION_ID
      AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME--NOT NEEDED
  /* PRMADDAL: ADDED BELOW 3 JOINS TO DERIVE ATTRIBUTION_CD AS PART OF Q4FY17 SOT OA */
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_RMA DIST
  ON CAST(EXALA.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID AS INTEGER)=DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID */
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_RMA EXT_ALL
     ON EXALA.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
  WHERE 1=1
  /*AND EXALA.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >= 'LastExtractDate' */
  AND EXAHA.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >= '$$LastExtractDate'
  AND EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_DATE IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, 'N') = 'Y'
  AND (  EFAA.APPLICATION_NAME ='Cisco Open RMA' AND EFAA.LANG = 'US'
   /* OR  ( EFAA.APPLICATION_NAME =  'Cisco Two Tier' AND EXALA.ATTRIBUTE7 IN 
                  ('REVENUE DEFERRAL OFFSET', 'REVENUE AMORTIZATION OFFSET', 'COGS DEFERRAL OFFSET', 'COGS AMORTIZATION OFFSET') ) */
              )
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EXALA.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)  
 AND ((COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE27,'N') <> 'Y') OR (COALESCE(EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE30,'N')<>'Y'))
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
  EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID                  ,
  EXALA.AE_LINE_NUM                   ,
  EXALA.APPLICATION_ID                ,
  EXALA.CCID AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID           ,
  EXALA. GL_SL_LINK_ID                 , /*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
 EXALA.ACCOUNT_CLASS AS ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE       ,
  EXALA.PARTY_ID                      ,
  EXALA.PARTY_SITE_ID                 ,
   'C' AS PARTY_TYPE_CODE              ,/*HARDCODED AS C BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA.ENTERED_DR,
EXALA.ENTERED_CR,
EXALA.ACCOUNTED_DR,
 EXALA.ACCOUNTED_CR,
  EXALA.CURRENCY_CODE                 ,
  EXALA. ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY            ,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA.ORDER_NUMBER     ,/* ATTRIBUTE1 MODIFIED AS ORDER_NUMBER BY VKOPPURA */
EXALA.ORDER_LINE_ID      ,/* ATTRIBUTE2 MODIFIED AS LINE_ID BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA.TRX_NUMBER      ,/* ATTRIBUTE3 MODIFIED AS TRX_NUMBER BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA.TRX_LINE_ID ,/* ATTRIBUTE4 MODIFIED AS TRX_LINE_ID BY VKOPPURA */
  EXT_ALL.TRX_DATE      ,/* ATTRIBUTE5 MODIFIED AS TRX_DATE BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID ,
EXALA.DIST_TYPE    ,
  EXT_ALL.ORDER_QUANTITY  ,
 '3500-01-01 01:00:00' as EXPIRATION_DATE   ,
  EXALA.GL_SL_LINK_TABLE              ,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_DR ,
      EXALA.UNROUNDED_ACCOUNTED_CR ,
      EXALA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_DR,
      EXALA.UNROUNDED_ENTERED_CR ,
  EXALA.GL_DATE    ,
  EXALA.LEDGER_ID                     ,
    EXALA.SOURCE_TABLE                  , /*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
   EXALA.SOURCE_ID                     ,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
    EXALA.CREATION_DATE                 ,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
    EXALA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,/*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
  'CG' AS GLOBAL_NAME                 , /*HARDCODED AS NULL BY VKOPPURA */
  EXALA.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME           ,
  EXALA.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
  EXALA.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME           ,
  EXALA.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
  'ATTRIBUTED' AS ATTRIBUTION_CD,
  CAST(COALESCE(SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1,100) AS DECIMAL(18,8)) AS ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
  COALESCE(SUB_ALL.SKU,'UNKNOWN') SKU,
  COALESCE(SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE12,-9999) OA_ATTRIB_ID,
  SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID AS TRANSACTION_ID,
  EXALA.ATTRIBUTE2
  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL  EXALA
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR EFAA 
  ON EXALA.APPLICATION_ID = EFAA.APPLICATION_ID
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_AR EXAHA
  ON EXAHA.AE_HEADER_ID = EXALA.AE_HEADER_ID
   AND EXAHA.APPLICATION_ID = EXALA.APPLICATION_ID
      AND EXAHA.GLOBAL_NAME = EXALA.GLOBAL_NAME
  /* PRMADDAL: ADDED BELOW 3 JOINS TO DERIVE ATTRIBUTION_CD AS PART OF Q4FY17 SOT OA */
  /*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_RMA DIST
  ON CAST(EXALA.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID AS INTEGER)=DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID */
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_RMA EXT_ALL
     ON EXALA.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
  
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_RMA SUB_ALL
     ON EXALA.TRANSACTION_ID = SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID
     AND EXALA.ATTRIBUTE2=SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE2
  
  WHERE 1=1
  /*AND EXALA.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >= 'LastExtractDate' */
  AND EXAHA.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >= '$$LastExtractDate'
  AND EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_DATE IS NOT NULL
  AND COALESCE(EXAHA.GL_TRANSFER_STATUS_CODE, 'N') = 'Y'
  AND (  EFAA.APPLICATION_NAME ='Cisco Open RMA' AND EFAA.LANG = 'US'
   /* OR  ( EFAA.APPLICATION_NAME =  'Cisco Two Tier' AND EXALA.ATTRIBUTE7 IN 
                  ('REVENUE DEFERRAL OFFSET', 'REVENUE AMORTIZATION OFFSET', 'COGS DEFERRAL OFFSET', 'COGS AMORTIZATION OFFSET') ) */
              )
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_LEDGER EAL WHERE EXALA.LEDGER_ID = EAL.LEDGER_ID)  
 AND (EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE27='Y' AND EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE30='Y')
